Hero Subject: adult fashion customer in minimalist satin lounge set with robe, fully covered non-explicit styling. Preserve these source mechanics: RAW phone mirror selfie, candid SNS photo, luxury fitting room, non-explicit adult fashion try-on mood. Concrete social variant uses adult fashion customer in minimalist satin lounge set with robe, fully covered non-explicit styling in luxury try-on suite, soft mirror reflection, handbag and folded garment details, candid friend-message energy.
